pilotRole: Prove soft mist, water, and rounded low-contrast materials remain readable beneath the live tile UI.

identity.biome: Rounded tidal stones, tide pools, shell mechanisms, lantern paths, and soft sea mist
identity.distortion: Caution and stillness have become suspended tension

restorationChange: Frozen water channels begin moving slowly; lantern paths pulse in a calm breathing rhythm.

landmarks.visual: Pearl bowls nested in rounded stone with a controllable tide gate.
Slow shell bellows and a compact waterwheel with visible inhale-exhale motion.
Flat tidal stones and lantern arcs arranged for playful route trials.
Partly submerged listening steps with tide-memory shells.

boss.name: Maelis
boss.visual: Ancient shell-and-stone tidal guardian with calm massive silhouette and mist-lit water seams.

arena.name: Maelis Tidelock Gate
arena.visual: Large shell lock over a narrow inlet with restrained water pressure.
